title: Punt-atlete neem deel aan Wes-Kaap kampioenskappe
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"'n Totaal 31 Hoërskool Punt-atlete neem dié naweek deel aan die Wes-Kaap kampioenskappe op Paarl.Hierdie atlete (onder) is gekiesvir die Eden-span wataan die provinsiale toernooi deelneem:","html":"'n Totaal 31 Hoërskool Punt-atlete neem
dié naweek deel aan die
Wes-Kaap kampioenskappe op Paarl.
Hierdie atlete (onder) is gekies
vir die Eden-span wat
aan die provinsiale toernooi deelneem:
"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"RY 1, VOOR (LINKS NA REGS )","html":"RY 1, VOOR (LINKS NA REGS )"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"XIAN NORTJE","html":"XIAN NORTJE"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GERHAN PRETORIUS","html":"GERHAN PRETORIUS"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KAI KOTZE","html":"KAI KOTZE"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"AMONE BILLING","html":"AMONE BILLING"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"JANA PRETORIUS","html":"JANA PRETORIUS"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CHRISTIANA MEYER","html":"CHRISTIANA MEYER"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"RY 2 (LINKS NA REGS)","html":"RY 2 (LINKS NA REGS)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FRANELL MARITZ","html":"FRANELL MARITZ"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"COLE GERHARDUS","html":"COLE GERHARDUS"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ZANE BRIESIES","html":"ZANE BRIESIES"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"DANE JAMNECK","html":"DANE JAMNECK"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ANJA MULLER","html":"ANJA MULLER"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CATHERINE-LEE GOUWS","html":"CATHERINE-LEE GOUWS"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"KEANU OCTOBER","html":"KEANU OCTOBER"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"RY 3 (LINKS NA REGS)","html":"RY 3 (LINKS NA REGS)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"DANELLE MARKS","html":"DANELLE MARKS"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"DEACON COOPER","html":"DEACON COOPER"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"RYAN VAN ECK","html":"RYAN VAN ECK"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"QURE ROETS","html":"QURE ROETS"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ANIKA FOURIE","html":"ANIKA FOURIE"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ELIZKA LE GRANGE","html":"ELIZKA LE GRANGE"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"LANA DAVIES","html":"LANA DAVIES"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ANNABELLE SCHOEVERS","html":"ANNABELLE SCHOEVERS"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"RY 4 AGTER (LINKS NA REGS)","html":"RY 4 AGTER (LINKS NA REGS)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ELFREYDEN HERMANUS","html":"ELFREYDEN HERMANUS"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"TYRON DELPORT","html":"TYRON DELPORT"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"FRANCO CILLIERS","html":"FRANCO CILLIERS"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"RUAN VAN BARKHUIZEN"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"LOIN VENTER","html":"LOIN VENTER"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"LUAN JANSE VAN RENSBURG","html":"LUAN JANSE VAN RENSBURG"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"JAYDEN STEYN","html":"JAYDEN STEYN"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CHRIZANNE SWART","html":"CHRIZANNE SWART"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]
